title: List of films featuring time loops
excerpt: This list of films featuring time loops in which characters experience the same period of time which is repeatedly resetting: when a certain condition is met, such as a death of a character or a clock reaches a certain time, the loop starts again, with one or more characters retaining the memories from the previous loop.[1]: 207 The list provides the names and brief synopses of films in which time loops are a prominent plot device.
